channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Offset Rolls Out Onstage in Wheelchair for First Performance After Being Shot
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "What's up, music fans. Welcome back to our show. We've got some exciting news to share with you today. Migos rapper Offset is back on stage, and it's a big deal. Just 48 hours after being released from the hospital, he performed at the University of Arkansas's Rowfest on Saturday. And we've got the details."
[Short music transition]
Host: "According to reports, Offset was rolled onto the stage in a wheelchair, but that didn't stop him from putting on a show for the energetic college crowd. The 34-year-old rapper was shot outside the Hard Rock Casino in Hollywood, Florida, on April 6, but fortunately, his injuries were non-life-threatening."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Offset took to Instagram to share some behind-the-scenes footage from the concert, captioning the post 'REAL LOVE'. The photos and clips show him posing in a red shirt, sunglasses, and a skeleton mask, and even being wheeled onto the stage. It's clear that Offset is back and ready to perform."
[Short music transition]
Host: "But what's also making headlines is the alleged altercation that led to Offset's shooting. Lil Tjay was arrested and charged with misdemeanor disorderly conduct in connection with the incident. And in a recent interview, he had some choice words for Offset, calling him a 'rat' and denying any involvement in the shooting."
[Short music transition]
Host: "It's clear that the drama is still unfolding, but one thing's for sure - Offset's fans are standing by him. At the Rowfest performance, fans were seen holding up phones displaying the message 'F—k Lil Tjay'. And if you're eager to see Offset live, his next scheduled performance is set for May 9 at the Xperience Live Event Center in Orlando, Florida."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today, folks. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
